mapper.select: SELECT i.item_id, i.day_id, i.memo, i.visit_order, img.image_id, img.image_url, img.member_id FROM itinerary_item i LEFT OUTER JOIN itinerary_image img ON i.item_id = img.item_id WHERE i.day_id = #{dayId} ORDER BY i.visit_order ASC
SELECT image_url FROM itinerary_image WHERE item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY uploaded_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO itinerary_image (image_id, item_id, image_url, uploaded_at) VALUES (itinerary_image_seq.NEXTVAL, #{itemId}, #{imageUrl}, SYSDATE)
